title: 3 Buy-Rated Stocks Breaking 52-Week Highs
text: Stocks nearing or breaking 52-week highs reflect considerable momentum, with positive earnings estimates from analysts commonly providing the fuel needed to continue climbing.

title: T-Mobile, Deere, and 5 More Stocks That Should Gain After Earnings
text: Evercore analysts came up with stocks that the everyday investor can still afford to buy and can expect to make money off of.

title: 7 Tech Stocks That Could Form the Next ‘Magnificent Seven'
text: For those who are unaware, the “Magnificent Seven” stocks are Microsoft (NASDAQ: MSFT ), Apple (NASDAQ: AAPL ), Nvidia (NASDAQ: NVDA ), Tesla (NASDAQ: TSLA ), Alphabet (NASDAQ: GOOG , NASDAQ: GOOGL ), and Amazon (NASDAQ: AMZN ). With the exception of Nvidia, those top tech stocks are largely focused on the cloud (MSFT and AMZN), the internet (GOOG and AMZN), software (MSFT), or hardware (Apple).

title: Exploit Market Inefficiencies, Buy Software
text: The unprecedented COVID-19 correction of 2020 forced investors to "throw out the baby with the bath water." Quality software stocks are a beneficiary.

title: Paradox Earns Workday Certified Badge for Scheduling Integration with Workday Recruiting
text: Used by clients like Pfizer, Unilever, and more, Paradox's Conversational Interview Scheduling saves recruiters and hiring managers countless hours every week — shortening time to schedule by more than 90%. SCOTTSDALE, Ariz.

title: Workday's (WDAY) New Features to Ease Business Decision Making
text: Workday (WDAY) enhances its Workday Adaptive Planning software with next-generation Elastic Hypercube Technology. It includes advanced features that streamline the business decision-making process.

title: Workday Introduces the Next-Generation Elastic Hypercube Technology for Workday Adaptive Planning
text: Technical Innovation and Embedded Artificial Intelligence Enable Global Organizations Like Boeing and Mondelēz International to Meet the Growing Scale and Complexity of Large Enterprise Planning PLEASANTON, Calif. , July 11, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- Workday, Inc.  (NASDAQ: WDAY), a leader in enterprise cloud applications for finance  and human resources , today introduced the next generation of its patented Elastic Hypercube Technology (EHT), the intelligent modeling engine that powers Workday Adaptive Planning , to address the growing demands on organizations as they model more complex business scenarios, manage changing business needs, and expand planning to more users.

title: Growth Investors Shouldn't Ignore These 3 Stocks
text: Investors have their preferences within the market and for understandable reasons. While some reap a steady income stream, others are rewarded with explosive growth.

title: The 7 Best Growth Stocks to Buy in July
text: This is a great time for investors to buy the best growth stocks. In addition to America's very strong macro trends, many companies have been reporting excellent results in the last several weeks.

title: Better Buy: Workday vs. Monday.com
text: Workday and Monday.com both digitally streamline tasks for companies. Workday is larger, more profitable, and more resistant to macro headwinds.
